<!--
status:
  ideating  — still being explored, open questions dominate
  parked    — well understood, not on roadmap; consider when designing related features
  planned   — committed to building; a spec exists or is being created
  deprecated — no longer relevant

maturity (independent of status — reflects depth of understanding):
  seed        — just captured, very fuzzy, many open questions
  developing  — being actively explored, shape is forming
  fleshed-out — stable mental model; well understood; ready to inform or become a spec
-->

## What is it?

Define the concept clearly in 2–3 sentences.

## Why does it matter?

Why is this worth capturing? What problem does it solve or opportunity does it represent?

## Design Influence

How should this concept be considered when designing related features? What constraints or
opportunities does it create for adjacent work? (Leave blank for `seed` concepts.)

## Open Questions

What is still unclear or unresolved?
